pageReadinessNote: 2 permanent_unresolved line(s) excluded under SRC-896. 19 IMAGE_MATCHED line(s) eligible for handoff.

lines.text: I am nervous over this and if this bring the dope he gave
me - well if it ever got out I am a dead duck sure as hell
in the U.S.A. first and myself well I don't amount to much
[REDACTED] said another party will contact me if he don't
in due time not any particular date. He said Russia is very
well prepared for war and will make darn short work of Europe
and England, Spain, France & India, Japan & Philippines, and he
said it will be soon and when Russia starts it will make Hitlers
look like a lot of school kids. He says he thinks Russia
has 350 atomic bombs. If you want any plainer drawings
of them saucers - yes I can draw plainer lines of course
if the Air tech. engineers will dope it out - you see I am
good on electronic gadgets as required on this saucer but
that is a good description of the drawings I saw.
In case you write to me put same
in plain envelope and address it to me at [REDACTED]
Yuba City, Calif. The jet I pictured is just the same as
was on the drawings Ubalsky had. I would like to hear
about this as this will give me an idea if this Ubalsky
is trying to give me horse feathers - I think tho it is
not any baloney - but may be it is.
